pin.","coverage":"covered by child 4: ddx home: presence-based root resolution + per-project worktree registry: part 4"},{"parent_ac":"Static check via lefthook: `rg 'filepath\\.Join\\([^)]*\"\\.ddx\"' cli/ --type go | grep -v '^cli/internal/ddxroot/'` returns zero hits. The lint rule is wired into pre-commit.","coverage":"covered by child 4: ddx home: presence-based root resolution + per-project worktree registry: part 4"},{"parent_ac":"Specs listed under SPEC IMPACT are updated in the same commit as the code refactor. Each updated spec references this bead ID.","coverage":"covered by child 5: ddx home: presence-based root resolution + per-project worktree registry: part 5"},{"parent_ac":"cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./... -count=1 green. Existing tests pass without modification.","coverage":"covered by child 5: ddx home: presence-based root resolution + per-project worktree registry: part 5"},{"parent_ac":"lefthook run pre-commit passes (including the new no-hardcoded-.ddx-paths rule).","coverage":"covered by child 5: ddx home: presence-based root resolution + per-project worktree registry: part 5"}],"child_ids":["ddx-77eb084e","ddx-fa6eedcc","ddx-b2a5aa0f","ddx-e4c3d791","ddx-d30bc1a0"],"rationale":"deterministic fallback split after agent decomposer returned empty output"}

Handle the failing internal/server gate separately before attempting to prove AC 13 on the parent bead.
